## Curation checklist

- [ ] PR is merged (not just closed)
- [ ] PR closes a GitHub issue filed before the PR was opened
- [ ] At least one test file is modified or added in the diff
- [ ] PR was merged after the model cutoff date (see `scripts/curate_problems.py`)
- [ ] The patch is self-contained (doesn't depend on infrastructure outside the repo)
